content.text:
[Fri 2026-04-17 15:12 EDT] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Fix the Recipe Rip app so emojis get added to the recipe title.

## Problem
When user clicks "+ Add Emojis" button in the recipe detail view, the emojis don't appear with the recipe title.

## File Location
~/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html

## What Should Happen
1. User clicks "+ Add Emojis" button
2. A prompt appears asking for emojis
3. User types emojis (e.g., 🍕🌮🍔)
4. The emojis should be appended to the recipe title (R.title)
5. The title should re-render showing the emojis

## Current Behavior
The button exists but clicking it doesn't seem to work properly.

## Your Task
1. Read the file ~/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html
2. Find the "+ Add Emojis" button and its onclick handler
3. Check if the logic is correct for appending emojis to R.title
4. Look for any JavaScript errors in the onclick handler
5. Fix any issues
6. Copy to dist-recipe: cp ~/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html ~/agent-mission-control/dist-recipe/index.html
7. Commit the fix
8. Test that it works

## Important
- The onclick should be: prompt for emojis, then R.title = R.title + ' ' + emojis, then render()
- Make sure the prompt default value shows some example emojis
- Don't change anything else - just fix the emoji-to-title functionality

Report what you fixed!

Maybe using exec with Perl or sed could work, or I could focus on altering smaller chunks instead. I'm planning to execute a Python script to modify the file directly. Let's see how that goes!

arguments.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
path = Path('/Users/bobbygalletta/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html')
text = path.read_text()
old1 = "function stopBurst(){_burstEls.forEach(function(el){try{el.remove();}catch(e){}});_burstEls=[];var rp=document.querySelector('.rp');if(rp){rp.classList.remove('gp','pulse');}};\n\n// Recipe extraction engine v5 — stronger instruction/ingredient separation\n"
new1 = "function stopBurst(){_burstEls.forEach(function(el){try{el.remove();}catch(e){}});_burstEls=[];var rp=document.querySelector('.rp');if(rp){rp.classList.remove('gp','pulse');}};\n\nfunction addTitleEmojis(){var R=st.recipe;if(!R)return;var e=prompt('Add emojis (e.g. 🍕🌮🍔):','🍕🌮🍔');if(e&&e.trim()){R.title=(R.title||'')+' '+e.trim();R.title=R.title.trim();render();}}\n\n// Recipe extraction engine v5 — stronger instruction/ingredient separation\n"
old2 = "h+='<button class=\"ap2\" onclick=\"var e=prompt(\\'Add emojis (e.g. 🍕🌮🍔):\\');if(e){R.title=(R.title||\\'\\')+\\' \\'+e;R.title=R.title.trim();render();}\">+ Add Emojis</button>';"
new2 = "h+='<button class=\"ap2\" onclick=\"addTitleEmojis()\">+ Add Emojis</button>';"
if old1 not in text:
    raise SystemExit('old1 not found')
if old2 not in text:
    raise SystemExit('old2 not found')
text = text.replace(old1, new1, 1).replace(old2, new2, 1)
path.write_text(text)
PY

content.thinking:
**Setting up a local server**

I need to set up a local server. I’ll use the command `exec python http.server` to run it in the background while in the appropriate folder. plan.step: Inspect recipe-rip index.html emoji button and handler
Fix emoji append logic in recipe title
Copy to dist, test, and commit

content.text:
Fixed it.

What I changed
- Found the bug: the `+ Add Emojis` button used an inline `onclick` that referenced local `R` from `render()`, which is not reliably available when the click fires.
- Added a global helper:
  - prompts with default example emojis: `🍕🌮🍔`
  - appends to `st.recipe.title`
  - trims and calls `render()`
- Updated the button to call `addTitleEmojis()`.

Files
- Updated source: `~/agent-mission-control/recipe-rip/index.html`
- Copied to dist: `~/agent-mission-control/dist-recipe/index.html`

Test
- Verified with a Node test that calling `addTitleEmojis()` changes:
  - `Tacos` → `Tacos 🍕🌮🍔`
  - and calls `render()`

Commit
- Committed tracked deploy file in repo:
  - `e9793e4` `Fix recipe title emoji button`

Note
- `recipe-rip/` is gitignored in that repo, so the commit includes `dist-recipe/index.html`, but the source file was still updated on disk as requested.
